name: Clipbase - Clipboard History Manager
short_description: Clipbase is an advanced clipboard manager app that boosts productivity by expanding on the copy-paste process. With features like clipboard history and smart search, Clipbase elevates your workflow to new heights. Join our Early Access journey to help shape its future!
detailed_description: Clipbase is a powerful and intuitive clipboard manager designed to enhance your productivity by streamlining the copy-paste experience. It offers a comprehensive set of features, including clipboard history management, smart search and filtering, customizable hotkeys, and secure data handling. By participating in our Early Access program, users can actively contribute to Clipbase's development, helping to create a top-notch clipboard management solution that caters to a wide range of needs.
about_the_game: Clipbase is a powerful and intuitive clipboard manager designed to enhance your productivity by streamlining the copy-paste experience. supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Polish*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Turkish*, Slovak*
*languages with full audio support
